channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Christian content creators are outsourcing AI slop to gig workers on Fiverr
item.description: In the beginning, platforms like Fiverr were places where people could hire freelancers to do specialized creative labor using skills that took years to develop. In the age of generative AI, though, many of these gig workers have embraced the technology in order to meet clients' demands. These workers' profiles emphasize that they can quickly […]

item.title: Le Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 sous Snapdragon X Elite s’allège de 600 euros pendant les French Days
item.description: Ce Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 équipé de son Snapdragon X Elite est un laptop très complet qui ne fait pas l'impasse sur l'autonomie. En ce moment, il est disponible à 1 289 euros avec le code FRENCHWEEK10 ou 1 284 euros avec le code PRIME15 pour les membres Prime.

item.title: Connecticut lawmakers approve bill for cell phone ban in schools — but critics argue that having different rules for adults and students is ‘not good role modeling at all’
item.description: Connecticut has taken a big step closer to outright banning phones during the school day, but reactions to the news are mixed.

item.title: 'Straight out of a fairyland' — winner of the 11th DJI and SkyPixel photo and video contest stunned judges with 'unique and otherworldly landscape' to bag the grand prize in the $200,000 pot, and it was captured with a Mavic 3 Pro
item.description: The 11th annual DJI and SkyPixel photo and video contest winners have been revealed, selected from over 95,000 entries, and you wouldn't believe what drone pilots are able to create with affordable gear

item.title: Près de 50 % des produits vendus par les sites de vente en ligne étrangers sont dangereux
item.description: La DGCCRF publie un rapport alarmant montrant qu'environ la moitié des produits disponibles sur les marketplaces étrangères ne sont pas conformes et dangereux.

item.title: 21 tech deals from the Amazon bank holiday sale that I'd buy — laptops, smartwatches, games, and essentials from under £10
item.description: You can treat yourself to some top tech for less this weekend, thanks to the Amazon bank holiday sale, so I've hand-picked 21 of the best deals that are worth buying.

item.title: Zuckerberg blames Meta layoffs on AI costs, says “compute and infrastructure” and “people oriented things” are biggest financial drain right now
item.description: Meta's capex rises as the company spends big on AI data centers, and it's having to reduce headcount to become more agile.

item.title: Hidden IT problems are quietly creating risk, shadow IT, and lost productivity
item.description: Presented by TeamViewerEnterprise technology failures are largely invisible. Research from TeamViewer, based on a global survey of 4,200 managers and employees, finds that the majority of digital dysfunction never reaches the IT help desk. Employees work around slow applications, failed logins, and intermittent glitches rather than reporting them, leaving organizations without an accurate picture of how their technology is performing. The cumulative cost is significant: employees lose an average of 1.3 workdays per month to digital friction, with impacts ranging from delayed projects and lost ...

item.title: De 500 Mo à 5 Go par mise à jour : comment Microsoft a alourdi Windows 11 en silence
item.description: Plus de 4 Go par mois en moyenne, parfois 5. Microsoft avait pourtant promis l'inverse il y a deux ans.

item.title: Oura adds birth control support to its period tracker
item.description: Oura is launching a new reproductive health feature that takes hormonal contraception into consideration when tracking period cycles. The smart ring maker describes the Hormonal Birth Control update as a "first-of-its-kind experience" inside Oura's existing Cycle Insights feature, allowing users to see how over 20 combinations of hormonal birth control methods - including pills, patches, […]...

item.title: 4 of the best Star Wars movies just dropped on a big Disney+ rival ahead of Star Wars Day 2026 — and one is rated higher than Return of the Jedi
item.description: A major Disney+ competitor just Force pulled four great Star Wars movies into its film library.

item.title: I asked ChatGPT to reimagine The Devil Wears Prada 2 ending based on the shocking Runway magazine AI twist in the sequel — and the results aren't as dreadful as you'd think
item.description: Runway Magazine nearly got bought out by an AI company in The Devil Wears Prada 2 ending — so I asked ChatGPT to work what would shake out if the deal happened in real life.

item.title: Our LG C6 OLED TV tests are underway — here’s your chance to ask our experts anything
item.description: Want behind-the-scenes access to our TV test bench? Here’s your chance to ask our expert reviewers everything you want to know about the LG C6 OLED TV.

item.title: 007 First Light art director says the limited edition Dualsense controller was inspired by a 'light' theme, not the inside of a gun barrel — 'What we were trying to do with that was reference more how the UI of the game feels'
item.description: IO Interactive has addressed criticism of the design of the 007 First Light limited-edition DualSense wireless controller, confirming it's not what some fans think.

item.title: 'Verified By Spotify' is the music streamer's new way to help you avoid AI artists, but it doesn't go as far as I'd like — especially with Deezer, Qobuz and Apple Music making major anti-AI steps
item.description: The Verified By Spotify badge lets you find out if an artist is real on the streaming giant, but you still can't filter out AI slop in playlists

item.title: Wendy’s is closing hundreds of stores: See an updated list of locations where the chain is shuttering the most
item.description: The fast food brand is in the middle of a turnaround effort to shed low-performing restaurants. Some states are being hit harder than others. Bringing home the Baconator is not as easy as it used to be, and it’s about to get even harder in cities around the country.

item.title: Don't be alarmed — this major Android Auto annoyance could be finally get fixed soon by Google after almost a decade
item.description: You may have been frustrated by not being able to dismiss alarms on Android Auto, but a tweak could be on the way.

item.title: 'A galaxy of new Star Wars games' and more are coming to Fortnite to celebrate Star Wars Day
item.description: Epic Games has released the roadmap for its month-long Fortnite x Star Wars Day celebrations, which includes a "galaxy of new Star Wars games" and more to keep fans busy.

item.title: 'An hour of scan time is all it took': "Copy Fail" flaw impacts all Linux kernels released since 2017, so patch now or face the consequences
item.description: Linux users should update their servers now, or face possible attack.

item.title: Alpha du Centaure en 20 ans au lieu de 100 000 : des mini-vaisseaux propulsés par la lumière ouvrent une piste folle
item.description: Propulsés uniquement par la lumière, les « métajets » pourraient bouleverser l’exploration spatiale en supprimant carburant et moteurs. Une avancée qui ouvre la voie à des voyages interstellaires vers Alpha du Centaure en quelques décennies seulement.

item.title: 'A technical whack-a-mole:' Utah to become the first US state to target VPN users with controversial age verification law — and digital rights experts are furious
item.description: Utah is set to become the first US state to penalize websites for failing to verify the age of users who mask their location with a VPN, sparking outrage from digital privacy experts.

item.title: Gemini peut enfin faire ce que ChatGPT fait depuis des mois
item.description: Gemini peut enfin générer vos fichiers PDF, Word ou Excel directement depuis le chat, sans quitter la conversation. Une mise à jour utile, avec tout de même un oubli de taille.

item.title: The Morning After: Instagram will try to penalize 'unoriginal' posts
item.description: Did Instagram put its feed slop on notice?

item.title: 17 Best Graduation Gifts That Aren't Totally Cringe (2026)
item.description: From tech to home goods, these giftable gadgets are as practical as they are cool.

item.title: People are finally using Reddit’s search
item.description: The company saw a 30% year-on-year jump in the number of people using search every week, CEO Steve Huffman said on Thursday.

item.title: On a testé la Xiaomi Pad 8, une tablette équilibrée, mais peut-être trop
item.description: Avec son écran LCD de 11,2 pouces, son processeur Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 et HyperOS 3, la tablette Xiaomi Pad 8 est adaptée aussi bien à une utilisation bureautique que multimédia, voire même ludique. Petite et polyvalente, donc.

item.title: Netflix has reportedly greenlit a prequel for 'The Crown'
item.description: It will cover events from Queen Victoria's death in 1901 until Princess Elizabeth's wedding.

item.title: Tim Cook warns about 'significantly higher memory costs' from June — and not surprisingly, Mac fans think price hikes are coming down the line
item.description: Apple has weathered the RAM storm pretty well so far, but that could change before long.

item.title: We’re all on Truth Social now
item.description: As a business, Donald Trump’s personal social network is insignificant. But it’s a potent tool for capturing the world’s attention. Hello again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In.

item.title: Cette petite voiture électrique sans permis française pourrait faire de l’ombre à la Citroën Ami
item.description: Tout juste lancée, la jeune marque française Ipop Automobiles dévoile sa première voiture électrique. Il s’agit plus précisément d’un petit quadricyle, produit en France et qui chasse directement sur les terres de la Citroën Ami.

item.title: Everyone’s switching from ChatGPT to Claude — but new tests say neither is the smartest free AI, and the real winner might surprise you
item.description: A new report challenges the idea that Claude has overtaken ChatGPT, showing that the smartest free AI depends on the task
